title: Lesson TTL mechanism — structural enforcement test

hypothesis.primary: Lesson survival is near 100% because no TTL mechanism exists; Sharpe<3 pool is the viable TTL target

method.sharpe_check: grep Sharpe: in all lesson files
method.inbound_citation_check: grep L-NNN across all lessons, principles, beliefs

notes: Survival 93.3%, not 100% — 63 lessons already archived (manual compact.py calls)
Sharpe<3 pool hypothesis FALSIFIED: only 1 lesson has explicit Sharpe<3; 522 have NO Sharpe
Real TTL pool: no-Sharpe + zero-inbound + age>50 = 126 lessons (14.3% reduction)
Structural isomorphism confirmed: swarm lesson accumulation mirrors bureaucratic rule accumulation
P-246 enforcement gap: compact.py exists (content-level) but no auto-TTL (unit-level) = F-HS1 granularity finding
Fix: wire TTL check into maintenance.py check_lessons — flag DUE for archive
isomorphism: Swarm TTL (no auto-TTL for old/uncited lessons) ≅ bureaucratic unit-level deletion absent (F-HS1)
next_step: Wire age>50 + no-Sharpe + zero-inbound check into maintenance.py check_lessons as DUE trigger (structural enforcement per L-601)
